description: The MOW framework implementation in this finding does not currently include rigorous truncation error bounds for the finite Galerkin matrix approximation, explicit constant tracking throughout the proof, or a certified argument establishing property tau. These would require: (1) reproducing the matrix approximation at much higher virtual arithmetic precision, with interval arithmetic for roundoff tracking; (2) extracting and propagating the constants used in the harmonic analytic bounds; (3) either proving property tau for the specific congruence subgroups used, or bounding the expansion explicitly. None of these are present in the supplied data.
action_taken: The MOW framework implementation lacks: (1) rigorous truncation error bounds, (2) explicit constant propagation throughout harmonic analysis bounds, (3) certified property-τ. All three are explicitly listed as known gaps in the finding page. The ρ_η ≤ 0.7606 bound is interval-certified (arb, 256-bit, commit 9428528) for the Galerkin matrix. Extracting fully explicit constants from the MOW/Dolgopyat framework and proving property-τ with effective bounds are substantial mathematical projects documented as future work.
